steps.title: Find the area scale factor
steps.content:
The surface area ratio from prism $X$ to prism $Y$ is
$$
\frac{1{,}200}{48}=25
$$
Surface area scales by the square of the linear scale factor.

steps.title: Find the volume scale factor
steps.content:
Since the surface area scale factor is $25$, the linear scale factor is $5$. Volumes scale by the cube of the linear factor:
$$
5^3=125
$$

steps.title: Find prism X volume
steps.content:
Prism $Y$ has $125$ times the volume of prism $X$, so
$$
V_X=\frac{1{,}875}{125}=15
$$

steps.title: Add the volumes
steps.content: The requested sum is $$ 15+1{,}875=1{,}890 $$ The answer is 1890.
